subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-03-09
subcodes.first_line: When you, who are the believers of God, gather together in a meeting, let all your conversation be about the Cause. Review the proofs that uphold it
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @Muhammad; Islam, @rejection of Muhammad, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @study; deepening
